pr.title: Record: 0.1582 BPB — Learned Mixer Head + No TTT + Matrix LR 0.03

output.summary: Learned mixer head gating with MATRIX_LR=0.03 and no TTT lets the neural expert blend training-derived n-grams without validation-time updates.
techniques: Learned mixer head predicts per-token expert weights combining neural model and frozen n-gram oracle
Raised matrix learning rate while disabling TTT to train the gate purely on training data
Score-first backward-looking n-gram cache drives single-pass evaluation
